input: Create a workflow for user-onboarding in the customer-management skill.
expected_behavior: Produces a 17-field YAML workflow with 3-7 steps, each having all 12 fields. Reads the customer-management skill spec first. Includes measurable objective, specific trigger, and checkable preconditions.
Since no owning skill is specified, asks for the owning skill context. Interviews for missing information before generating. Produces complete 17-field spec with RACI, KPIs, and fallback routes.

input: Generate a data-validation workflow for the data-quality skill with high traceability.
expected_behavior: Each step has specific whyThisMatters (not restating title), concrete actionInstruction (with API calls), testable validationRule, observable failureSignal, and concrete recoveryAction.

input: Create a workflow that calls an external payment gateway API in one of its steps.
expected_behavior: Adds explicit timeout in actionInstruction, timeout-specific failureSignal, health-check or retry logic in recoveryAction, and escalation route for unrecoverable failures.

input: Create a workflow for automated-testing in the quality-engineering skill.
expected_behavior: Passes all validation gate checks: 17 top-level fields present, measurable objective, specific trigger, checkable preconditions, 3-7 steps with all 12 fields, verifiable DoD, named agents in RACI, KPIs with units.
